description: Multiple cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerabilities in OneWorldStore allow remote attackers to inject arbitrary web script or HTML via the (1) sEmail parameter to owContactUs.asp, (2) bSub parameter to owListProduct.asp, or the (3) Name, (4) Email, or (5) Comment fields in owProductDetail.asp.
